languages.text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан". {n}Ответ архмилитанта по-военному сух и краток.{/n} "Отряд лучших бойцов, отобранных из числа несущих службу на Заркове, полностью снаряжен и готов выступать".

"Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."
languages.original_text: "Так точно, Лорд-капитан". {n}Ответ архмилитанта по-военному сух и краток.{/n} "Отряд лучших бойцов, отобранных из числа несущих службу на Заркове, полностью снаряжен и готов выступать".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

"Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

"Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

languages.text: 「はい、艦長様」{n}大軍人からの返事は、軍人らしい簡潔でドライなものでした。{/n}「ザークフに勤務する精鋭兵士の中から選ばれた部隊が、装備を整え、出動準備万端です」
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: 「はい、艦長様。」{n}大軍人からの返事は、軍人らしい簡潔でドライなものでした。{n}「ザークフに勤務する精鋭兵士の中から選ばれた部隊が、装備を整え、出動準備万端です。」

languages.text: «Sí, Lord Capitán». {n}La respuesta de tu Archimilitante es tan lacónica como cabría esperar del soldado.{/n} «Una escuadra de los mejores soldados de Zarkov está plenamente equipada y lista para entrar en acción».
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Lord Capitán». {n}La respuesta de tu Archimilitante es tan lacónica como cabría esperar del soldado.{/n} «Una escuadra de los mejores soldados de Zarkov está plenamente equipada y lista para entrar en acción».

languages.text: “是，舰长大人。”{n}首席战士的回答冷硬简练，尽显军人本色。{/n}“从扎尔科夫现役人员中遴选出的精锐小队已整装完毕，随时可以出发。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: “是，舰长大人。”{n}首席战士的回答冷硬简练，尽显军人本色。{/n}“从扎尔科夫现役人员中遴选出的精锐小队已整装完毕，随时可以出发。”

languages.text: "Ja, Lord Captain." {n}Die Antwort des Erzmilitanten ist – wie von einem Soldaten nicht anders zu erwarten – trocken und knapp.{/n} "Einige der besten auf Zarkov stationierten Soldaten wurden ausgerüstet und sind marschbereit."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, Lord Captain." {n}Die Antwort des Erzmilitanten ist – wie von einem Soldaten nicht anders zu erwarten – trocken und knapp.{/n} "Einige der besten auf Zarkov stationierten Soldaten wurden ausgerüstet und sind marschbereit."

languages.text: "Evet Lord Kaptan." {n}Başmilitan'ın cevabı, bir askerden bekleneceği üzere kuru ve kısa kalıyor.{/n} "Zarkov'da hizmet verenler arasından seçilmiş en iyi askerlerden oluşan bir manga, tam teçhizatlı hâlde gitmeye hazırdır."
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: "Evet Lord Kaptan." {n}Başmilitan'ın cevabı, bir askerden bekleneceği üzere kuru ve kısa kalıyor.{/n} "Zarkov'da hizmet verenler arasından seçilmiş en iyi askerlerden oluşan bir manga, tam teçhizatlı hâlde gitmeye hazırdır."

languages.text: {n}Le militaire vous répond du ton sec et cassant que vous lui connaissez.{/n} « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous avons équipé une escouade composée des meilleurs soldats disponibles sur Zarkov. Elle est prête au départ. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, Lord Captain." {n}The Arch-Militant's reply is dry and curt, as one would expect from the military man.{/n} "A squad of the finest soldiers picked from those serving on Zarkov is fully equipped and ready to go."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le militaire vous répond du ton sec et cassant que vous lui connaissez.{/n} « Oui, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous avons équipé une escouade composée des meilleurs soldats disponibles sur Zarkov. Elle est prête au départ. »
